goal: Diagnose and fix missing or partially missing card artwork in the card codex so all current cards render their intended images consistently.
constraints: Follow the existing card codex and asset-loading architecture unless a clear bug requires a targeted fix.
Investigate actual causes before editing code or data.
Do not change unrelated gameplay, balance, or combat logic.
If asset gaps or naming mismatches are found, document the exact scope in the final response.
deliverables: A root-cause diagnosis for missing card artwork in the card codex.
A targeted fix in code and/or data if feasible within the existing architecture.
Verification evidence showing which cards were missing and whether they now resolve correctly.
